connection_user_message: Unable to connect to LLM endpoint
connection_resolution_steps: Check if the endpoint service is running (e.g., Ollama: ollama serve)
billing_user_message: Your API account balance is insufficient
billing_resolution_steps: Top up your balance on the LLM provider's dashboard
Add a backup API key (Settings > Models > Multi-key rotation)
Switch to a different LLM provider
api_key_resolution_steps: Update your API key in Settings > Models
Verify API key is valid and not expired
Check if API key has correct permissions
For Ollama/LM Studio: use 'dummy' or empty string as api_key
model_resolution_steps: Install the model (e.g., Ollama: ollama pull {model_name})
Check if model name is correct in LLMConfig
For OpenAI: check model name spelling
custom_model_not_found_resolution_steps: Run 'ollama list' or check LM Studio models list
Download the model if not installed
rate_limit_resolution_steps: Upgrade API plan for higher rate limits
Check if other processes are using the same API key
Use fallback_llm to handle rate limits automatically
context_overflow_resolution_steps: Use a model with larger context window
response_format_error_user_message: Model output validation failed, automatically switching to stronger model
response_format_error_resolution_steps: System is automatically switching to fallback model
If issue persists, consider upgrading primary model
Check weak model configuration for JSON mode
Verify tool call argument schema is correct
timeout_resolution_steps: Use a faster model or endpoint
Enable streaming mode for better responsiveness
unknown_resolution_steps: Check LiteLLM documentation for this error
Enable debug logging for detailed error trace
thinking_budget_exhausted_user_message: The model used all output tokens for reasoning and produced no response
thinking_budget_exhausted_resolution_ste: Switch to a model with larger output capacity
Simplify the question to reduce reasoning depth
Break complex questions into smaller sub-questions
tool_call_truncated_user_message: Tool arguments may be incomplete due to output length limit
tool_call_truncated_resolution_steps: Use chunked writes for large files instead of writing all at once
Break the task into smaller steps
Check the output file for completeness
text_continuation_exhausted_user_message: Response remained truncated after 3 continuation attempts
text_continuation_exhausted_resolution_s: Ask the model to be more concise
Break the question into smaller parts
thinking_signature_user_message: Thinking block signature was invalidated — automatically retrying
image_too_large_user_message: Image exceeds provider size limit — automatically compressing and retrying
long_context_tier_user_message: Conversation exceeds subscription context tier — automatically compressing
long_context_tier_resolution_steps: Upgrade your API subscription for larger context access
Start a new conversation to reduce context length
provider_policy_blocked_user_message: Request blocked by provider data/privacy policy
provider_policy_blocked_resolution_steps: Adjust your privacy settings on the provider dashboard (e.g., OpenRouter Settings > Privacy)
Try a different model or provider
